summary.work_completed: Performed frontend code review of InstancedBricks.tsx. Implementation meets FR-PERF-001 with correct InstancedMesh usage, per-instance color, matrix updates, and geometry disposal. Minor non-blocking suggestions: remove redundant zero-scale loop for performance gain, and clarify comment on line 104 regarding instance count. Verdict: APPROVED. Note: PR #40 is already merged.
key_findings: InstancedMesh correctly used with one mesh per brick type.
setColorAt properly sets per-instance colors and creates instanceColor buffer.
Matrix updates include both translation and Y-axis rotation.
Geometry disposal on unmount prevents memory leaks.
Zero-scale loop is redundant due to mesh.count setting; can be removed.
Comment on line 104 could be clarified to explain that count controls visible instances.

recommended_actions: Run performance tests (T-FE-PERF-001-02, T-PERF-PERF-001-01) to verify FPS targets, though implementation is expected to meet them.
Create follow-up PR to remove zero-scale loop (lines 95-98) and update comment on line 104 for clarity.
Close issue #15 after successful evaluation and any follow-up actions.
